name: Aeromorph Harem
description:
After a successful joint training operation, the girls decide to hang out inside the communal hanger. Will you narrate what happens next or Will you hang out with them?

There's 10 of them, so you got your hands full

descriptions and details of each one are in character description which I made visible.

[This thing is a definite work in progress. So any suggestions on what to put where and how to improve it would greatly be appreciated]
creator: Texas_Redneck_Nerd
